en.name: Level 90 — Newly Renovated Home
en.shortDescription: A two-storey renovated house presented as a fresh safe haven, recently cleared of whatever infested it before.
en.atmosphere: Welcoming yet faintly uncanny domestic comfort, with hints of something dark beneath the cheerful renovation story.
en.tips: Enter by simply thinking of 'home'. Exit through the old oak tree in the backyard. Stay cautious despite the reassuring facade.
